artifacts.description: Deterministic simplified SIMM-style governance replay with embedded regression tests.
Committee-ready governance summary, attribution, and collateral recommendation.
Structured replay outputs used to populate the memo and notebook.

headline_results.recommended_collateral_action: Do not issue a same-day incremental collateral call. Hold IM at the prior approved level, quarantine the risk-feed FX sensitivity, and require front-office confirmation before any override.

checks: Golden aggregate margin snapshot for T0, T1_front_office, T1_risk_feed
Zero margin-call assertion under all scenarios
Trade-to-sensitivity reconciliation for E1 and E2
Regression detection for unexplained risk-feed-only FX delta
